global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on the headline and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes, possibly circles and squares, in a light teal background.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A secondary graphic element that appears to be a larger square shape, also in a light teal background.

elements.label: Overlay graphic element
elements.description: An overlay graphic element that includes various shapes, blending into the background.

elements.label: Top left label
elements.description: A small label in the top left corner, possibly indicating user-generated content (UGC).

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, prominent text at the bottom center stating 'Escape this weekend' with a subtext 'Flexible booking options' beneath it.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Flexible booking options

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A logo at the top of the ad, featuring the word 'DriftPass' in a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A clear call to action button at the bottom center stating 'Try for free' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: A small icon in the top left corner indicating user-generated content (UGC), likely a simple graphic.
